examples: The court granted him permission to disinter the body.
To a woman, he seems uncaring and disinter - ested and a man sees her as annoying or pedantic.
Earlier Almond had asked Smith if he thought it feasible to disinter the dead buried at Hungnam.
Mr. Obama may want to disinter an infamous line from then candidate but ever gaffemeister Joe Biden, who quipped that it was patriotic to pay higher taxes.
